name: The Last 15 Minutes
description: The Last 15 Minutes – Horror Puzzle Game Trapped in a dark basement with flickering lights, you have only 15 minutes to escape. Solve puzzles, find keys, and uncover secrets—every corner hides danger. Use your flashlight wisely and test your courage. Can you survive… or become part of the darkness?
instructions: Controls WASD Move E Interact C Crouch H Hint Esc Pause
